title: Chest on a Ghast
body:
## Overview

A **simple and lightweight mod** that lets you give your **Happy Ghasts** portable storage!  
Just **right-click a Happy Ghast with a Minecart Chest** to attach it — no commands, no setup, just seamless logistics.

---

## Features

- 📦 **Attach Minecart Chests** – Right-click Happy Ghasts with a chest minecart to give them storage  
- 🛫 **Flying Storage** – Bring your inventory with you while exploring the Nether skies  
- ❌ **No Dependencies** – Doesn't require Fabric API or any other libraries  
- 🧍 **Player-Friendly** – Easy to use, no configs needed  
- 🧪 **For Minecraft 1.21.6+**

---

## Need Help?

I created this mod mostly for my own needs, but if you run into a bug or have a feature request, feel free to contact me on Discord:  
👉 [https://discord.gg/FaxbR9eEFW](https://discord.gg/FaxbR9eEFW)  
I'll do my best to help you out!
